prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第 128–137 名（2026 年第 137 名），属全国中游偏上水平，在西北地区综合类高校中有一定认可度；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及图书馆管理类事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 104，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平；历史投档异常记录中未见宁夏大学相关信号，报考心理较为平稳；第五轮学科评估中该校无 A- 及以上等级学科，整体学科实力处于中游，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏热，与该校理科组招生专业匹配度较高；陕西省 2026 年物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年（172468 人）增加约 34000 人（+19.7%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；宁夏大学位于宁夏银川，属西北邻省，对陕西考生有一定地域接近性；该校全国招生规模中陕西省占比约 0.9%–1.0%（2025 年约 50 人/5575 人），属中等偏下水平，非主要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 44695、2026 年计划小幅扩招（+4.4%）及陕西省物理类考生大幅增加（+19.7%）等因素，供需弹性计算指向位次后移；考生规模扩张是主要推高竞争的因素，扩招部分抵消但不足以逆转。预测最低位次约 46084 名，区间 45584–46584 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 28553 → 55009 → 57023 → 41277 → 44695. A significant backward shift (gap) occurred in 2022–2023, with a clear rebound to 41277 in 2024, and a slight backward shift to 44695 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past 3 years is about 41,000–57,000, with a baseline of approximately 44,695 in 2025. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 82 in 2021, 95 in 2022, 132 in 2023, 171 in 2024, and 203 in 2025 (Physics Category), showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 212, an increase of 9 from 2025, an expansion of about 4.4%, slightly increasing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking in recent years is approximately 128–137 (137th in 2026), placing it at the upper-middle level nationally, with a certain degree of recognition among comprehensive universities in the Northwest region. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving library management incidents, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 104, rated as average, with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level. No signals related to Ningxia University were found in historical abnormal admission records, indicating a relatively stable application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no A- or above disciplines, with overall discipline strength at a medium level, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular socially, matching well with the university's science group enrollment majors. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shaanxi Province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,000 (+19.7%) from 2025 (172,468), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, a neighboring province in the northwest, offering some regional proximity for Shaanxi candidates. The university's national enrollment scale accounts for about 0.9%–1.0% in Shaanxi Province (approximately 50 out of 5,575 in 2025), which is at a medium-low level, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 44,695, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+4.4%), and the significant increase in Shaanxi Physics Category candidates (+19.7%), supply-demand elasticity calculations indicate a backward shift in ranking. The expansion of the candidate pool is the main factor driving up competition, partially offset by the expansion but not enough to reverse it. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 46,084, with a range of 45,584–46,584.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 45,584–46,584, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 45,500), prioritize competitive engineering majors such as Electronic Information Engineering and Computer Science and Technology. If the ranking is near the upper limit (around 46,500), consider Tier 2 majors like Water Resources and Hydroelectric Engineering and Geographic Information Science first, and ensure safe admission with Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 4426 → 4379 → 10531 → 10757 → 8573. In 2023, there was a significant drop (from about 4400 to 10531), in 2024 it remained basically flat at 10757, and in 2025 it rebounded to 8573. The fluctuation range in the past 3 years is about 8500–10800, with a baseline of about 8573 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts group enrollment plan was 39 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 36 (history category) in 2025, showing considerable fluctuation. The 2026 plan is 48, a significant increase of 12 (+33.3%) compared to 2025, indicating a notable expansion and easing of competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In recent years, the Soft Science main ranking is approximately 128–137 (137th in 2026), placing it at the upper-middle level nationally, with a certain degree of recognition among comprehensive universities in the Northwest region. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving library management incidents, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 104, rated as average, with low to medium exposure on short video platforms. No signals related to Ningxia University were found in historical abnormal admission records, indicating relatively stable application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no disciplines rated A- or above, with overall discipline strength at the middle level, limiting its appeal to high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese are relatively hot, while teacher training/education majors are showing divergent trends. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in Shaanxi Province is about 88,500, an increase of about 12,859 (+17.0%) compared to 2025 (75,641), indicating a significant expansion of the candidate pool and intensified competition. Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, a neighboring province in the Northwest, offering some geographical proximity to Shaanxi candidates. The university's national enrollment scale accounts for about 0.9%–1.0% in Shaanxi Province, which is at a medium to low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8573, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+33.3%), and the notable increase in history category candidates in Shaanxi Province (+17.0%), the supply-demand elasticity calculation points to a backward shift in ranking. The expansion rate exceeds the candidate growth rate, but rankings reached 10500+ levels in 2023–2024, and after rebounding to 8573 in 2025, there is some downward adjustment pressure. It is expected that the ranking will shift slightly backward under the dual effects of expansion and candidate growth. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10,438, with a range of 9,938–10,938.
